field.label: Enable topology mapper
field.help: Enable topology discovery and API endpoints.

field.label: Use LLDP discovery
field.help: Use LLDP neighbors when lldpd is available.

field.label: Use ARP discovery
field.help: Discover IPv4 neighbors from ARP table.

field.label: Use NDP discovery
field.help: Discover IPv6 neighbors from NDP table.

field.label: Maximum nodes
field.help: Hard limit for returned node count to protect UI performance.

field.label: Enable geo map API output
field.help: Expose geo map dataset for public/external IPs.
